name: Odico A/S
summary: Odico A/S manufactures formwork for the construction and wind turbine industries. It also provides consulting services, such as CAD-CAM integration, design guide and verification, parametric design and advanced modeling, project management, and project engineering services, as well as development of solutions for fabrication; and prototyping services. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Odense, Denmark.
